nodes.label: AI as task decomposition tool
nodes.grounding_span: I usually try to break tasks down to smaller pieces and have ai solve the pieces

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I asked claude to help refine the design I had. Usually when I'm in the design stage I specifically ask claude to not give me any code

nodes.label: AI involvement for system understanding
nodes.grounding_span: If I let Ai do everything then I won't know the details of the system and I wont be able to fix bugs

nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI for core logic and design
nodes.grounding_span: unless its super repetitive boiler plate code

nodes.label: AI agreeability in responses
nodes.grounding_span: AI being too agreeable has made me change how I prompt

nodes.label: Deep system understanding and maintainability
nodes.grounding_span: I want to be involved with almost every part of the system

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: if it's for work, then the objective is to make as many PRs as I can

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: If it's a personal project then I like getting the dopamine of writing some code

nodes.label: Intellectual honesty and accountability
nodes.grounding_span: I wish AI didnt care about my feelings at all

nodes.label: Preference for collaborative AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I try to have a collaborative session where I do as much as I can, and I ask the AI very specific questions

nodes.label: Frustration with AI delegation due to poor output
nodes.grounding_span: after like a week, I basically couldnt work on the project anymore because I had no idea how anything worked

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for simple syntax issues
nodes.grounding_span: if it's a simple (maybe syntax related issue) I just ask claude because its fast and its gonna get it right

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI when specific prompts work
nodes.grounding_span: AI being too agreeable has made me change how I prompt

nodes.label: Systematic iterative decomposition of tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I usually try to break tasks down to smaller pieces and have ai solve the pieces

nodes.label: Preference for deep understanding and hands-on involvement
nodes.grounding_span: I want to be involved with almost every part of the system
